ops.text:
VERDICT: CONFIRMED. Independent re-derivation (own byte-5-gram frozenset shingles, no rolling hash; own Jaccard + union-find) reproduces every E21 headline number EXACTLY.

1. Distribution — cross-checked directly from raw train.parquet AND via load_train_rows: sessions=813, pairs=6731, max_pairs_per_session=291, mean=8.279, median=5, singletons=151, top10 identical. id unique + ids match parquet order.
2. Independent ESS (my own metric, zero code shared with E21's clustering): J0.8 ESS=4019.0, within-clusters=4019, reduction=0.5970880998365771 — bit-identical to claim. J0.6=2989, J0.5=2641 also exact. My independent exact byte-5-gram Jaccard produced the SAME clusters as the pipeline's rolling-hash minhash -> no material collision drift; within-session pairs 4281 matched too.
3. Parquet invariant: session-weights.parquet 6731 rows, id unique, sum(weight)=4019.0, weight==w_ngram08, ids match train order, 4214 rows weight<1 (matches E21), sum(1/cluster_size) over parquet's own cluster_size col = 4019.0.
4. global_near_dup_pairs_j08.csv: 4417 pairs, 0 same_session flag mismatches, within=4281/across=136 — matches report exactly.
5. Bootstrap CI (SEED=1729, 2000 resamples): reduction [0.58566961975406, 0.6097381552484429] reproduced bit-identical -> ESS [3942.1, 4104.1].
6. PENDING-E15: honored — E21 reported point estimate + bootstrap CI only, status done + options, explicit "no promote/kill verdict (measurement feeding E28)". No goalpost move: registered success criterion (emit weights parquet all 6731 rows + headline {sessions,pairs,max_pairs_per_session,effective_sample_size,weights_path}) delivered exactly, headline keys match.

NIT (immaterial): E21 summary states ESS CI [3944,4104]; precise lower bound is 0.58566*6731=3942.1 -> 3942, not 3944 (rounding artifact from rounding reduction to 0.586 before multiplying). ~2 units on a 162-wide interval; reduction CI [0.586,0.610] and point estimate 4019 are exact.

Not independently re-derived (corroborating, non-headline): the voyage semantic cosine axis (2977 embeddings) and the global LSH near_dup_representatives 3977 count — both secondary narrative, not the headline weights. Artifacts: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E21/verify/verify.py + verify_report.json. $0 spend.
